page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 40 dedicated physical cores and 40 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 9.6 GB per core. The processor includes 35 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512F and AVX-512_VNNI, which accelerate vector and neural network operations. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.hfr6.10xlarge demonstrates solid performance across memory-intensive and multi-threaded workloads. The instance achieved a stress-ng multi-core CPU score of 38318.39 and a PassMark CPU score of 34031.19. Memory performance is highlighted by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 2128.36 GB/sec and a large block uncached read bandwidth of 111.38 GB/sec. Database operations are strong, with PassMark database benchmarks recording 14328.81 operations and Redis SET operations reaching 32.74 million operations per second. For text and compression tasks, the system processed multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 164.02 GB/sec.

The qualitative cost profile of this instance reflects its high resource density, offering a balanced tradeoff between dedicated compute cores and a large memory footprint without the added expense of local SSDs or GPU accelerators. This makes the ecs.hfr6.10xlarge highly suitable for memory-heavy applications, including large-scale databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, enterprise resource planning systems, and data-intensive processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 40 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs running at 3.1 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding 9.6 GB per core, but contains no local storage or GPU hardware. The instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. In performance testing, it achieves a PassMark CPU score of 34031.19 and a Redis SET throughput of 32.74 million operations per second, supported by a large-block uncached memory read bandwidth of 111.38 GB/sec. This hardware profile provides high memory density and dedicated compute resources, making it a cost-efficient choice for memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suited for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, and complex data processing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 40 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-throughput database and in-memory workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized dedicated instance featuring high memory density and strong database throughput for demanding enterprise workloads.

384.0 GB of RAM providing 9.6 GB per core for memory-heavy tasks
